top_signals.title: South Korean Stocks Jump 5% After Turbulent Week on AI Swings
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks rebounded after a near 10% drop in the previous two sessions, highlighting skittish investor sentiment as scrutiny grows over the sustainability of the global AI boom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Extreme Weather Will Upend U.S.-China Competition
top_signals.summary: The cost of falling behind on climate adaptation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Job seekers giving up: Labor force participation rate falls to lowest in 50 years, outside of Covid era
top_signals.summary: A drop in the unemployment rate helped provide some upside to what was an otherwise downbeat jobs report — but it was for all the wrong reasons.

top_signals.title: GreenMet plans $150M rare earth processing hub in West Virginia
top_signals.summary: The project will operate as a hub-and-spoke critical minerals processing network, with Greenbrier County serving as the central processing hub.
